gaps.title: Telegram Account and Session Manager
gaps.jtbd: When setting up cold outreach campaigns, I want to authenticate and manage Telegram accounts with unique proxies and human-mimicking delay rules, so that I can send campaigns from multiple rotated identities without getting instantly banned.
gaps.acceptanceCriteria: Given an administrator in the admin panel, When they authenticate a new Telegram account using OTP or a session file and bind a valid SOCKS5 proxy, Then the status is monitored in real-time and successfully switches to Active.
gaps.reason: literal brief requirement under 'Модуль 1. Управление аккаунтами (Session Manager)'

gaps.title: AI Dialog Assistant Integration
gaps.jtbd: When an outreach recipient replies to a message, I want an AI Dialog Assistant using an LLM to automatically handle the response using context and custom prompts, so that lead qualification is automated.
gaps.acceptanceCriteria: Given an active dialogue with a lead, When the lead sends an incoming reply, Then the Spring AI integration triggers an LLM completion using the conversation history and configured system prompt, generating and sending an automated response.
gaps.reason: literal brief requirement under 'Модуль 3. AI-Ассистент (LLM Dialog Engine)'

gaps.title: Unified Live Chat CRM Svelte Panel
gaps.jtbd: When an automated dialogue requires manual human intervention, I want to use a unified color-coded CRM dashboard to read and send messages directly, so that the operator can easily take over control and pause the AI auto-replies.
gaps.acceptanceCriteria: Given an active dialog with color-coded status, When an operator sends a message manually via the CRM interface, Then the message is dispatched to the Telegram client and AI auto-response is instantly disabled.
gaps.reason: literal brief requirement under 'Модуль 4. Диалоговая Панель (Live Chat CRM на Svelte)'

gaps.title: Automated Session Warming Engine
gaps.jtbd: When deploying newly initialized or bought Telegram accounts, I want the system to automatically perform background warming activities such as subscribing to channels and simulating online reading, so that account trust is built and bans are avoided.
gaps.acceptanceCriteria: Given a newly registered Telegram account, When the background session warming task runs, Then it executes simulated online presence, channel subscriptions, and post reads using dynamic timeouts.
gaps.reason: literal brief requirement under '4. Решение проблемы блокировок (Anti-Ban Strategy)'

gaps.title: Docker-Compose Production Deployment Config
gaps.jtbd: When my application development is complete, I want to deploy the Spring Boot backend, Svelte SSR frontend, PostgreSQL, and Redis databases via a single docker-compose configuration on my private VPS, so that the platform is easily self-hosted.
gaps.acceptanceCriteria: Given a clean VPS server with Docker and Docker Compose, When running docker-compose up, Then the Spring App, Svelte, Postgres, and Redis containers launch, establish secure internal connections, and expose the Svelte Web UI.
gaps.reason: literal brief requirement under '5. Этапы разработки и MVP'

gaps.title: Administrator Authentication and Session Security
gaps.jtbd: When accessing the private self-hosted admin panel, I want to authenticate securely as an admin using Spring Security, so that unauthorized users cannot gain control of my Telegram accounts or campaign databases.
gaps.acceptanceCriteria: Given an unauthenticated visitor, When they request any campaign management dashboard or backend REST API endpoint, Then their access is blocked with a redirection to the secure Login Page or a 401 Unauthorized response.
gaps.reason: domain-standard expectation for a private self-hosted SaaS-like admin panel with custom administrators (Spring Security and Users table schema are mentioned in the brief)

gaps.title: Outreach Recipient Blacklist and Opt-out Management
gaps.jtbd: When a lead sends a negative reply or demands to be unsubscribed, I want the system to automatically add their phone or username to a blacklist, so that future outreach campaigns do not target them and trigger user-initiated spam bans.
gaps.acceptanceCriteria: Given an incoming lead message indicating negativity, When the intent engine detects an opt-out intent, Then the lead's status is set to Blacklisted/OptedOut and any subsequent campaign execution targeting them is blocked.
gaps.reason: domain-standard expectation for recipient opt-out and spam mitigation in mass cold-outreach products
